promise: Move one consequential AI-delivered work package from output to evidence, review, decision, and signed receipt.

exampleMissions.title: AI research report acceptance
exampleMissions.input: A client-ready AI research report and source list
exampleMissions.output: Decision-ready docket with claim-to-evidence map, source freshness, reviewer questions, and receipt

exampleMissions.title: AI automation delivery review
exampleMissions.output: Acceptance criteria mapping, test evidence, limitations, rollback notes, and receipt

exampleMissions.title: Market-entry proof mission
exampleMissions.input: Target market hypothesis, sources, competitor notes
exampleMissions.output: Evidence-backed option set, risk ledger, decision deck, and next-action graph

exampleMissions.title: Grant or milestone verification
exampleMissions.output: Milestone acceptance record with evidence, reviewer notes, and signed receipt

exampleMissions.title: Vendor / procurement review
exampleMissions.input: Vendor proposal, claims, demos, security notes
exampleMissions.output: Claims matrix, proof gaps, risk ledger, and accept/request-changes/reject decision

exampleMissions.title: Defensive cybersecurity readiness review
exampleMissions.input: Repo-owned defensive evidence and remediation proposal
exampleMissions.output: Safe review packet, no-secret evidence summary, issue list, and human-gated remediation path
